summary: D12: deploy/Caddyfile — reverse proxy from §7.5 (Authenticated Origin Pulls trust bundle, localhost:3000 upstream)

resolution.note: deploy/Caddyfile created from §7.5. Uses {$DOMAIN} Caddy env substitution; bootstrap injects DOMAIN via systemd drop-in at caddy.service.d/env.conf. AOP trust bundle enforced via require_and_verify client_auth.
